notes: Profiles can now share the same global shortcut, applied to whichever one's game is actually running. Fixed function-key shortcuts (e.g. Ctrl+Shift+F7) not being capturable. System tray now pins a currently-running game's profile to the top of the menu. Profile editor: delete confirmation, 'Test | Apply' renamed to 'Apply', 'Remove titlebar' no longer experimental, Save split into 'Save' and 'Save & Close', and layout fixes.
